audit_items.proof_trace: EIP-1559 base fee calculation is consensus layer (CL) responsibility. The target execution layer library (alloy-evm) receives pre-calculated base_fee from block headers (L171: base_fee_per_gas: header.base_fee_per_gas().unwrap_or_default()) without implementing or validating the EIP-1559 formula. No code paths exist for computing base_fee_delta from parent_gas_used and gas_target.
